title: Deliciously Crumbly Slovakian Potato Dumplings
description: A traditional Slovakian dish featuring funky crumbly potato dumplings with dried leaves of summer savory, flambe, and jain-friendly ingredients, perfect for kids.

ingredients.name: egg
ingredients.notes: replaced with flax egg for jain option

instructions: In a large bowl, combine grated potatoes, flour, dried summer savory, salt, and black pepper.
In a small bowl, whisk together egg and water, then add to the potato mixture and stir until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape using your hands or a rolling pin.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat and flambe the dumplings for 2 minutes on each side.
Reduce heat to low and cook for an additional 10 minutes, flipping occasionally, until the dumplings are golden brown and crispy.
